description: Canonical curated spirits merged into spirits.reco.json (manufacturer-verified, sheet SKUs SPI-CUR-*).

products.name: Pappy Van Winkle 23yr

awards.result: Best Bourbon / Best Small Batch Bourbon
awards.organization: New York World Wine & Spirits Competition

paragraphs: Pappy 23 is straight bourbon from a wheated mash, bottled at 95.6 proof (47.8% ABV) — Advanced on the whiskey journey, where long-aged wheated bourbons live.
It opens with caramel and ripe apples, then cherries, oak and tobacco come forward with a quiet hint of chocolate underneath.
The wood is pronounced but never harsh — barrel character that rides on top of orchard fruit instead of drying the palate out.
It lands on a long, sweet caramel finish — the kind that keeps unfolding between sips rather than fading off the tongue.
expertise.pairingBridge: Cherry, oak and chocolate in the glass reward a maduro or cocoa-leaning cigar — the cigar picks up the chocolate, its leather picks up the tobacco, and neither side fights for the room.

sensoryPrelude.paragraph: Caramel and ripe apple open first, then cherry, oak, and tobacco with a quiet hint of chocolate — pronounced wood that never turns harsh beside the {{cigar}}.
sensoryPrelude.observation: The finish stays long and sweet on caramel. Patient, full, and worth sipping slowly between draws.

flavorHero.caramelChocolate: Caramel and chocolate in the glass — my pick is the Pappy Van Winkle 23yr. Ripe apple and cherry over oak and tobacco, pronounced wood giving way to a long sweet caramel finish.
flavorHero.appleOrchard: That apple and orchard note points to the Pappy Van Winkle 23yr — caramel and cherry up front, oak and tobacco in the middle, long sweet caramel on the finish.
flavorHero.woodOak: Wood and oak in the glass — the Pappy Van Winkle 23yr delivers pronounced barrel character without drying out: caramel, ripe apple, cherry, and a long sweet caramel finish.

products.menuLine: Pappy Van Winkle 23yr · Kentucky Straight Bourbon · $85 · 95.6 proof (47.8% ABV) · wheated mash · Whiskey Journey: Advanced · Notes: caramel, ripe apples, cherries, oak, tobacco, hint of chocolate; pronounced wood flavors into a long sweet caramel finish · Awards: SF World Spirits Gold 2019; IWSC Silver 2019 (Star Attraction); USC Excellent/Highly Recommended 90–94 pts 2018; NYWWSC Best Bourbon & Best Small Batch 2018; Pacult 5 Stars 2018; World Whiskies Awards Overall Winner 2018

guidance.bestFor: Celebration pours, advanced wheated bourbon seekers, luxury cigar pairings.
guidance.avoidIf: Novice first bourbon, budget ceiling under $40, or user wants low-proof session pours.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when the member names Pappy, wants a unicorn bourbon, or asks for advanced wheated depth with orchard fruit and long caramel finish.
guidance.memberBlurb: Pappy Van Winkle 23yr — long-aged wheated bourbon with caramel, orchard fruit, and pronounced sweet wood.

products.name: Blanton's Single Barrel

spec.mash: Corn, rye, malted barley (Buffalo Trace mash bill #1)

paragraphs: Blanton's Single Barrel is Kentucky straight bourbon from Buffalo Trace mash bill #1 at 93 proof — maple, honey, and vanilla with orange citrus, stewed berries, caramel, and toffee (distillery-official profile).
It is the original single-barrel bourbon: approachable structure for a relaxed cigar without the long-aged weight of allocated Van Winkle bottles.
Novice on the whiskey journey — the natural first stop before you reach for advanced wheated pours like Pappy 23.
expertise.pairingBridge: Cream and cedar in a medium-bodied cigar echo the citrus and baking spice in the glass; caramel and toffee in the pour keep the finish sweet between draws.

products.menuLine: Blanton's Single Barrel · Kentucky Straight Bourbon · $31 · 93 proof (46.5% ABV) · BT mash bill #1 · Whiskey Journey: Novice · Notes: maple, honey, vanilla, orange citrus, stewed berries, caramel, toffee, baking spice

guidance.bestFor: First bourbon pour, approachable cigar pairings, Buffalo Trace curiosity.
guidance.avoidIf: User wants peat, agave, or ultra-premium allocated pours only.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend as the canonical novice bourbon — single-barrel sweetness with citrus lift beside medium cigars.
guidance.pairingAffinity: Medium-bodied cigars, cream and cedar profiles
guidance.memberBlurb: Blanton's Single Barrel — the original single-barrel bourbon with maple, honey, citrus, and baking spice.
